value.found_quote: The content your agent reads and writes is not recorded by default. These opt-in variables add content to the exported data
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes a "Control sensitive data in exports" section that matches the claim precisely. It states that content the agent reads and writes is excluded from telemetry by default ("not recorded by default"), and then lists opt-in environment variables (OTEL_LOG_USER_PROMPTS, OTEL_LOG_TOOL_DETAILS, OTEL_LOG_TOOL_CONTENT, OTEL_LOG_RAW_API_BODIES) that can be set to add content to the exported data. This directly substantiates the claim about sensitive data export controls with opt-in variables.
